output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?candidate ?candidateLabel WHERE {
  ?election wdt:P31 wd:Q34296 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q2145 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1607 ?candidate .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
  FILTER(?year = 2017)
  ?candidate rdfs:label ?candidateLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?candidateLabel) = 'en')
}

BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) FILTER (?year = 2017) ?candidate rdfs:label ?candidateLabel . FILTER (LANG(?candidateLabel) = 'en') }", "answer": "Ram Nath Kovind"}}
